summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Dispatcher Dashboard (Ready to Dispatch), Dispatcher TV Mode, Supervisor Dashboard, SKU Management, and Escalate to Supervisor. All 14 backend tests pass. All UI dashboards functional with proper data display.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, not visible to users)

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_new_features_v4.py - New test file for v4 features
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created, verified existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested. Dispatcher Dashboard shows 51 items ready for dispatch with TV Mode auto-refreshing every 10 seconds. Supervisor Dashboard shows 5 escalated tickets with SLA hours remaining. SKU Management shows 11 SKUs with CRUD operations. Call Support Dashboard has Escalate to Supervisor and Route to Hardware buttons with 100+ character notes requirement.

dispatcher_dashboard.details: Shows 51 items ready to dispatch with stats (Ready to Dispatch: 51, Dispatched Today: 0, Total in Queue: 51)

dispatcher_tv_mode.details: Auto-refreshes every 10 seconds, shows dispatch queue with Live indicator, all columns visible

supervisor_dashboard.details: Shows 5 escalated tickets with SLA hours remaining (10h, 12h, 19h, 32h, 36h)

supervisor_queue.details: Shows tickets with status 'escalated_to_supervisor' with supervisor_sla_due and supervisor_hours_remaining fields

sku_management.details: Admin can view 11 SKUs, create new SKU, adjust stock

escalate_to_supervisor.details: Escalate to Supervisor button visible in Call Support action dialog with 100+ char notes requirement
escalate_to_supervisor.button_location: Call Support Dashboard > Work button > Action Dialog
escalate_to_supervisor.validation: Backend rejects escalation if notes < 100 characters (returns 400)

route_to_hardware.details: Route to Hardware Service button visible with 100+ char notes requirement
route_to_hardware.button_location: Call Support Dashboard > Work button > Action Dialog
route_to_hardware.validation: Backend rejects routing if notes < 100 characters (returns 400)

api_tests_summary.TestDispatcherQueue: 2/2 passed - queue endpoint returns 51 items with ready_for_dispatch status
api_tests_summary.TestSupervisorDashboard: 4/4 passed - queue, stats, escalated tickets, SLA info
